title: Private Test Update and Rescore
content:
Hi everyone,

There is an outlier well in the private test set that we've decided to exclude from scoring. I will be beginning a rescore shortly. Since this only affects the private set, you won't notice any change in the leaderboard. And, since the data for this well is still a part of the test set, the change shouldn't affect submission runtimes either.

Basically, this should be an invisible update except you might notice your existing submissions briefly have a score "pending" and this is why.

comments.content: @ryanholbrook 2 notebooks that lastly scored the best are know showing as an error, is it due to this? thanks for the info

replies.content: Same here my best scoring got an error, submit exact same notebook and it worked, weird…
Apologies for the trouble. I've alerted the team. Have you noticed the error recur since yesterday?
No worries! It's fine for new submissions on my side

comments.content: Hi @ryanholbrook My submitted notebook run for 16582 seconds but scoring process is still run. So could you explain the way of scoring phase work?
